privileged_info_summary: I have audited the task and discovered a fatal architectural bug. The task.json hooks section explicitly specifies a pre_task setup script (setup_task.ps1) and a post_task export script (export_result.ps1) to be executed from the task directory inside the container. However, neither of these files actually exists in the task repository. Because export_result.ps1 is missing, the expected output file C:\\tmp\\task_result.json is never generated. Consequently, the verifier script fails immediately with a Failed to read result JSON error, rendering the task completely impossible to pass regardless of the agent performance.
